mapper.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM sales_order so JOIN sales_order_detail sod ON sod.so_id = so.so_id WHERE so.so_id=#{salesOrderId} AND so.status='REQUESTED' )

select p.product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.maker_name, p.is_prescription, p.storage_type, p.status as pro_status, il.lot_no, il.expiry_date, il.current_qty, il.location, il.status as lot_status from product p join inventory_lot il on p.product_id = il.product_id where p.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId}

select p.product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.maker_name, p.status as pro_status, il.lot_no, il.expiry_date, il.current_qty, il.location, il.status as lot_status from product p join inventory_lot il on p.product_id = il.product_id where p.product_id = #{productId} and p.status='ACTIVE' and il.status='NORMAL' and il.current_qty > 0 and il.expiry_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 11 order by il.expiry_date asc
SELECT so.so_id, so.status FROM sales_order so WHERE so.so_id=#{salesOrderId} AND so.status='REQUESTED'
SELECT so.so_id, so.status FROM sales_order so

SELECT so.so_id, so.customer_id, cu.customer_name, req_em.emp_id as reqEmployeeId, req_em.emp_name as reqEmployeeName, so.approve_emp_id, app_em.emp_name as appEmployeeName, so.order_date, so.approve_date, so.status, so.total_amount, so.memo, so.created_at, so.updated_at FROM sales_order so join customer cu on so.customer_id = cu.customer_id join employee req_em on req_em.emp_id = so.request_emp_id left join employee app_em on app_em.emp_id = so.approve_emp_id WHERE so.so_id=#{soId}

select so.so_id, so.customer_id, cu.customer_name, req_em.emp_id as reqEmployeeId, req_em.emp_name as reqEmployeeName, so.approve_emp_id, app_em.emp_name as appEmployeeName, so.order_date, so.approve_date, so.status, so.total_amount, so.memo, so.created_at, so.updated_at, sod.order_qty from sales_order so join customer cu on so.customer_id = cu.customer_id join employee req_em on req_em.emp_id = so.request_emp_id left join employee app_em on app_em.emp_id = so.approve_emp_id join sales_order_detail sod on sod.so_id = so.so_id where so.so_id=#{soId}
